zh.lifeSummary: Barbara Bradley是Katherine Bewicke的女兒，於1620年出生在英國艾可斯普爾 布普斯亞德。她於1642年與Andrew Lester在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可格盧斯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1654年2月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Barbara Bradley是Katherine Bewicke的女儿，于1620年出生在英国艾可斯普爾 布普斯亞德。她于1642年与Andrew Lester在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可格盧斯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1654年2月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bradley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places throughout England named Bradley, from Old English brād ‘broad’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Scottish: habitational name from Braidlie in Roxburghshire.
Irish (Ulster): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó Brolcháin ‘descendant of Brolacháin’, a diminutive of the personal name Brólach, compare Brawley . This was a learned family.

variants.name: Brawley
meanings: Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Brólaigh ‘descendant of Brolach’, a personal name possibly derived from brollach ‘breast’.

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Barbara Bradley was born in 1620, in Steeple Bumpstead, Essex, England as the daughter of Katherine Bewicke. She married Andrew Lester in 1642, in Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 2 February 1654, in New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Barbara Bradley est née en 1620, à Steeple Bumpstead, Essex, Angleterre, fille de Katherine Bewicke. Elle a épousé Andrew Lester en 1642, à Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 février 1654, à New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 34 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Barbara Bradley è nata il nel 1620 nel Steeple Bumpstead, Essex, England come figlia di Katherine Bewicke. Lei sposato Andrew Lester nel 1642, nel Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 2 febbraio 1654, nel New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Barbara Bradleyは1620年にイギリスエセックススティープル ブンプステアドでKatherine Bewickeの娘として生まれた。1642年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスグロウセスターでAndrew Lesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1654年2月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンニュー ロンドンで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Barbara Bradley(은)는 1620년 영국 에세스 스티프일 버프스테아드에서 Katherine Bewicke의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1642년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 그루스스터에서 Andrew Lester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1654년 2월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 뉴 런던에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Barbara Bradley nasceu em 1620, em Steeple Bumpstead, Essex, Inglaterra filha de Katherine Bewicke. Ela casou-se com Andrew Lester em 1642, em Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1654, em New London, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Barbara Bradley родилась в 1620 г. в местности стипл бумпстид, эссекс, Англия. Её мать звали Katherine Bewicke. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andrew Lester в 1642 г. в местности глоусестир, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 2 февраля 1654 г. в местности ню лондон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Barbara Bradley nació en 1620, en Steeple Bumpstead, Essex, Inglaterra como hija de Katherine Bewicke. Se casó con Andrew Lester en 1642, en Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1654, en New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 34 años.
